evidence_quotes.quote: the ability of video games publisher to detroy their product after purchase.

paragraphs.text: Hello, i wanted that this is a great act from the EU, but it does fail to cover one aspect, the ability of video games publisher to detroy their product after purchase. No other industry as such practices, car companies don't come and take your car away once they stop making that particular model, tech companies don't destroy your computer or smartphone once a new model is out to force you to buy it, why are video games companies allowed to do what would unacceptable for other products? This is why i would like to ask that the digital fairness act also protects video games ownership and stop big vodeo games companies from taking away what we have rightfully and legally bought, it os a problem that as been ignored for far tooling and i truly it would make a perfect addition to this act. Thank you.
